meaning: n.<涓荤編>(鐞冪被姣旇禌涓殑)鏆傛椂浼戞伅,(宸ヤ綔鏃剁殑)宸ラ棿浼戞伅
examples: If it is waiting indefinitely, then it is set to the maximum timeout value at runtime.
Coming out of the timeout, the Buckeyes put together their best run of the game.
After a timeout, Bryant's 3-pointer drew the Lakers to 101-100 with 2 seconds left.
